title: Multi-platform CLI release pipeline and install scripts

source.subject: Add CI/CD pipeline for multi-platform CLI releases with SeaweedFS distribution; add install scripts and downloads documentation

body:
Adds superrepo **CI/CD for multi-platform CLI releases** with SeaweedFS distribution, install scripts, and downloads documentation.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`2948606`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/2948606)
- **Subject:** Add CI/CD pipeline for multi-platform CLI releases with SeaweedFS distribution; add install scripts and downloads documentation
- **Completed:** 2026-03-05

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`

## Relation
Foundation for all **ci-release** upload/retry tasks (no v01-cli-release deliverable).
